---
# Inhibit system recovery (shadow-copy / backup deletion)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

Pre-encryption, ransomware destroys recovery options: PROCESS command lines containing `vssadmin`, `wbadmin`, `bcdedit`, or `shadowcopy` catch `vssadmin delete shadows /all`, `wbadmin delete catalog`, `bcdedit /set recoveryenabled no`. Any of these from a non-admin-maintenance context is a near-certain T1490 precursor to impact — treat as high severity and pivot immediately to the host's recent process tree.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and (actor_process_command_line contains "vssadmin" or actor_process_command_line contains "wbadmin" or actor_process_command_line contains "bcdedit" or actor_process_command_line contains "shadowcopy")
| fields _time, actor_process_image_name, actor_process_command_line, causality_actor_process_image_name
```

_Query syntax live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window). Adapt thresholds + the `contains`/`in` sets to your environment; filter early to keep the scan cheap._
